articles.author: Max Gao
articles.title: Yerin Ha on Becoming a "Bridgerton" Leading Lady and Season 4's Sultriest Scenes - Harper's BAZAAR
articles.description: The Korean-Australian actress on working with Luke Thompson, that bathtub scene, and joining the 'Bridgerton' universe.
articles.content: Yerin Ha has felt like the belle of her own ball for the last 15 months. From the moment she was cast as Sophiethe maid who falls for Luke Thompsons free-spirited, aristocratic artist Benedictin the … [+13800 chars]
